title: eurybia pulchra
intro: Eurybia pulchra, also known as the sea lavender or sea rosemary, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Eurybia pulchra include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
